title: Xenial Yeasty Croatian Lamb Skewers
description: A pungent and bouncy Croatian dish featuring yeast and coconut cream, perfect for a solo dinner, this high protein friendly meal is cooked on a comal.
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together yeast, coconut cream, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the yeast mixture.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers on the preheated comal and cook for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium low and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
